description_long: This is a crumpled, empty aluminum can with a yellow and orange color scheme and a retro-style label. The can features bold, cursive typography with the word 'Squash' prominently displayed, along with 'Appelsin' and a crown motif above. The surface is covered with fine, dotted patterns and contains nutritional information, a barcode, and recycling symbols on the back. The top of the can is visibly crushed and open, exposing the darkened, torn metal edges. The overall appearance suggests it has been discarded, possibly found in an urban environment such as a street or park.
description: A crushed yellow-orange aluminum can with retro graphics, bold cursive text, and a visibly damaged top.
description_view_0: The back of the can shows a barcode, recycling symbols, and some fine print, with the top crushed and torn.
description_view_1: The front displays the main label with bold 'Squash' and 'Appelsin' text, a crown motif, and a clean view of the retro design.
description_view_2: The side view highlights nutritional information and part of the label text, with the can's crumpled form visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the '330ml' volume marking, nutritional details, and a partial view of the main label, with the crushed top evident.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a retro dotted background in yellow and orange, with bold, cursive typography and a crown motif. The design is simple, with minimal imagery and a focus on vintage-style text and color blocking.
